scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:deploy: npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate:deploy --prefix backend && npm run start --prefix backend
